block.supertntmod.bedrock_tnt.tooltip: Destroys EVERYTHING in 25 block radius - even bedrock!
block.supertntmod.emerald_tnt.tooltip: Rains emeralds, diamonds, gold and lapis
block.supertntmod.lightning_tnt.tooltip: Summons 20 lightning bolts in a storm
block.supertntmod.freeze_tnt.tooltip: Turns water to ice, covers ground with snow
block.supertntmod.wood_tnt.tooltip: Destroys trees, they regrow after 1 minute
block.supertntmod.command_tnt.tooltip: Hold a block + right-click to set target, sneak + right-click to change radius
block.supertntmod.tnt_door.tooltip: First user becomes owner, opens normally for them
block.supertntmod.tnt_door.tooltip2: Non-owners get a warning, then BOOM!
block.supertntmod.encrypted_tnt_chest.to: Password-protected chest, only owner can open
block.supertntmod.walking_tnt.tooltip: Follows players who make eye contact
block.supertntmod.walking_tnt.tooltip2: Explodes on contact! Owner is safe.
block.supertntmod.mob_freeze_tnt.tooltip: Freezes ALL hostile mobs for 10 minutes and encases them in ice
block.supertntmod.water_tnt.tooltip: Extinguishes fires, pushes entities with water wave, leaves small puddles
block.supertntmod.rainbow_tnt.tooltip: Transforms blocks into colorful wool (30 block radius)
block.supertntmod.lego_tnt.tooltip: Builds structures from real Lego bricks with studs!
block.supertntmod.makarna_tnt.tooltip: Transforms blocks into edible food blocks - bon appetit!
block.supertntmod.seker_tnt.tooltip: Creates a candy & chocolate world + speed boost!
block.supertntmod.shrink_tnt.tooltip: Shrinks all nearby entities to tiny size!
block.supertntmod.growth_tnt.tooltip: Grows all nearby entities to giant size!
block.supertntmod.cleanse_tnt.tooltip: Removes all effects and size changes
block.supertntmod.fake_tnt.tooltip: A delicious cake... or is it?
item.supertntmod.tnt_frisbee.tooltip: Throwable TNT - destroys in + pattern, returns to you
item.supertntmod.tunneling_item.tooltip: Right-click blocks to drill tiny holes when shrunk to 1/12 scale
item.supertntmod.tunneling_item.too_larg: Too large to tunnel! Must be 1/12 scale or smaller.
item.supertntmod.tunneling_item.granted: You received a Tunneling Tool! Right-click blocks to drill through them.
item.supertntmod.portal_gun.tooltip: Shoots portals - first pink, then green. Walk through to teleport!
item.supertntmod.among_us_report.tooltip: Right-click any mob or player to instantly eliminate them!
block.supertntmod.proximity_mine.tooltip: Explodes when any living entity comes within 2 blocks. You have 2 seconds to run!
item.supertntmod.grappling_hook.tooltip: Right-click to launch — latches onto blocks and pulls you there instantly!
block.supertntmod.magnet_tnt.tooltip: Pulls all nearby entities toward it for 3 seconds, then BOOM!
block.supertntmod.gravity_tnt.tooltip: Inverts gravity for nearby entities for 10 seconds — enjoy the fall!
block.supertntmod.invisible_tnt.tooltip: Disguised as stone — nobody suspects a thing!
block.supertntmod.swap_tnt.tooltip: Randomly teleports all nearby entities to each other's positions!
block.supertntmod.bounce_tnt.tooltip: Launches ALL nearby entities sky-high! No block damage.
item.supertntmod.shrink_ball.tooltip: Throw at your feet to shrink yourself! Does not affect others.
item.supertntmod.grow_ball.tooltip: Throw at your feet to grow yourself! Does not affect others.
item.supertntmod.shrink_potion.tooltip: Throw at an entity to shrink it! Scale Lock blocks the effect.
item.supertntmod.grow_potion.tooltip: Throw at an entity to grow it! Scale Lock blocks the effect.
item.supertntmod.scale_lock.tooltip: Hold or equip to block all scale-changing effects!
item.supertntmod.amethyst_helmet.tooltip: Cannot be removed once equipped! Use Energy Crystal to loosen.
item.supertntmod.amethyst_chestplate.too: Cannot be removed once equipped! Use Energy Crystal to loosen.
item.supertntmod.amethyst_leggings.toolt: Cannot be removed once equipped! Use Energy Crystal to loosen.
item.supertntmod.amethyst_boots.tooltip: Cannot be removed once equipped! Use Energy Crystal to loosen.
item.supertntmod.drawing_item.tooltip: Right-click to draw — your art becomes real lego blocks! 16 layers of depth.
block.supertntmod.blocker_chest.tooltip: Only the owner can open it. Others die instantly + 1 min chest ban!
message.supertntmod.blocker_chest.owner_: You are now the owner of this Blocker Chest!
message.supertntmod.blocker_chest.title: Blocker Chest
message.supertntmod.blocker_chest.killed: That chest wasn't yours! You are banned from all chests for 1 minute.
message.supertntmod.blocker_chest.banned: You are banned from opening chests!
block.supertntmod.mirror.tooltip: Glows when placed! Endermen looking at it attack themselves.
block.supertntmod.light_bomb.tooltip: Glows and destroys ALL hostile mobs within 100 blocks every second (players included!)
item.supertntmod.spicy_chips.tooltip: Eat and zoom! Grants Speed III for 20 seconds.
item.supertntmod.energy_crystal.tooltip: Right-click: breaks bedrock! New bedrock spawns below each broken layer.
item.supertntmod.energy_crystal.broken: Bedrock broken! A new layer emerged below.
item.supertntmod.ender_send_spawn_egg.to: Summons a 20-block tall Ender Send! Watch out for eye contact.
item.supertntmod.control_remote.tooltip: Hold and press T to freeze all mobs and players within 25 blocks!
item.supertntmod.control_remote.tooltip2: 1.5 minutes of blindness + paralysis. 30 second cooldown.
message.supertntmod.control_remote.activ: All nearby entities have been disabled!
item.supertntmod.black_hole.tooltip: Blinds and pulls all nearby entities toward you! Deals 5 hearts of damage. 15 uses.
item.supertntmod.lightning_spell.tooltip: Right-click to strike lightning where you look! 64 block range. 32 uses.
item.supertntmod.craft_axe.tooltip: Break 1: record position. Break 2: build a wall between them.
item.supertntmod.craft_axe.first_set: First point set: [%d, %d, %d]. Now break the second point.
§aYou are now the owner of this chest! Type your password in chat:
§cThis chest doesn't belong to you! BOOM!
§aPassword set! Your chest is now protected.
message.supertntmod.tnt_door.owner_set: You are now the owner of this TNT door!
message.supertntmod.tnt_door.warning: §c⚠ WARNING: This door doesn't belong to you! Try again and it will explode!
message.supertntmod.tnt_door.not_owner: §c💥 This door doesn't belong to you! BOOM!
advancement.supertntmod.root.title: Super TNT World
advancement.supertntmod.ice_age.title: Ice Age
advancement.supertntmod.ice_age.descript: Obtain both Freeze TNT and Mob Freeze TNT
item.supertntmod.laser_sword.tooltip: Right-click to fire a laser! 9 block range.
item.supertntmod.laser_sword.tooltip2: Destroys blocks instantly. Deals 15 hearts to living entities. 20 second cooldown.
item.supertntmod.lava_crystal.tooltip: Hold in hand — immune to fire and lava!
block.supertntmod.herobrine_spawner.tool: Place it... if you dare. Herobrine will appear.
advancement.supertntmod.herobrine_summon: Place a Herobrine Spawner. Don't say we didn't warn you.
block.supertntmod.end_gate.tooltip: Step through to teleport to The End!
block.supertntmod.ghost_block.tooltip: Looks like grass but you can walk right through it!
block.supertntmod.wooden_ghost_block.too: Looks like oak planks but you can walk right through it!
block.supertntmod.wrong_golden_plate.too: Looks like a gold pressure plate — instantly kills anyone who steps on it!
block.supertntmod.right_golden_plate.too: Looks like a gold pressure plate — completely harmless.
block.supertntmod.nether_tnt.tooltip: Explodes to create a floating netherrack island with 15 Nether portals!
block.supertntmod.end_tnt.tooltip: Explodes to create a floating end stone island with active End portals!
item.supertntmod.diary.tooltip: Only the owner can read it. Others see nothing.
item.supertntmod.end_pearl.tooltip: Throw in The End: kills the dragon + grants end stone, crystals and bedrock!
item.supertntmod.nether_pearl.tooltip: Throw to teleport to the Nether + receive 64 blaze rods!
item.supertntmod.rainbow_boots.tooltip: Wear and forget falling — wool blocks appear under every step!
item.supertntmod.blood_sword.tooltip: Bright red — wounds spurt red liquid on every hit!
item.supertntmod.heart_axe.tooltip: Navy blue axe — instant-kills mobs; deals 250 damage to players.
block.supertntmod.cam_tnt.tooltip: Explodes and shatters every glass block within 30 blocks!
block.supertntmod.gizli_tnt.tooltip: Invisible — instantly kills all living entities within 25 blocks!
block.supertntmod.ureyen_tnt.tooltip: Multiplies and spreads until it hits bedrock, then explodes!
block.supertntmod.kup_tnt.tooltip: Excavates a 25×25×25 cube straight down underground!
block.supertntmod.kalp_tnt.tooltip: Gives regen + absorption to all nearby, clears all effects and resets size.
block.supertntmod.gunes_tnt.tooltip: Creates 15 End crystals — all disappear except one after 5 seconds.
block.supertntmod.bulut_tnt.tooltip: Starts rain and fills the sky with clouds.
block.supertntmod.simsek_yagmur_tnt.tool: Starts a thunderstorm and rains 30 lightning bolts!
block.supertntmod.zehir_tnt.tooltip: Inflicts slowness and poison on all nearby entities.
block.supertntmod.olumcul_su_tnt.tooltip: Floods 15 block radius with water and deals damage!
block.supertntmod.zeynep_komut_tnt.toolt: Grants all powerful effects and a Nether Star to nearby players.
advancement.supertntmod.end_gate.title: Dimensional Traveler
advancement.supertntmod.nether_tnt.title: Hellish Winds
advancement.supertntmod.end_tnt.title: Beginning of the End
advancement.supertntmod.cam_tnt.title: Shattering
advancement.supertntmod.gizli_tnt.title: Silent Killer
advancement.supertntmod.ureyen_tnt.title: Infinite Spread
advancement.supertntmod.kup_tnt.title: Cubic Excavation
advancement.supertntmod.diary.title: Secret Pages
advancement.supertntmod.end_pearl.title: Dragon Slayer
block.supertntmod.redstone_tnt.tooltip: Massive blast; nearby players gain Speed II and Strength II for 1 minute.
block.supertntmod.maden_tnt.tooltip: Drops 10 of every refined ore item.
block.supertntmod.crafting_table_tnt.too: Scatters golden helmets, netherite swords, iron axes and a netherite ingot.
item.supertntmod.hiz_esyasi.tooltip: Grants Speed II + Jump Boost for 60s. If you crash into a wall or fall hard during that time, you EXPLODE!
item.supertntmod.hiz_esyasi.activated: ⚡ Speed Item active! Crash within 60 seconds and you EXPLODE!
block.supertntmod.soru_blogu.tooltip: Break it for a surprise — war loot, lava, or an angry mob.
item.supertntmod.koku_bombasi.tooltip: Throws a green egg — anyone touching the toxic soil dies instantly. Soil decays in 60 seconds.
item.supertntmod.dondurucu.tooltip: Hits a mob → the mob dies and you receive its spawn egg.
item.supertntmod.esya_calmaca.tooltip: Right-click to peek into the inventory of the nearest player within 10 blocks.
item.supertntmod.esya_calmaca.title: Stealing from %s
